source.scope: Official-source-backed Tunisia calendar-year 2026 ordinary individual income-tax scale on caller-confirmed annual net taxable income.

TN.notes: Ordinary IRPP under the current 0%, 26%, 28%, 32% and 35% scale on caller-confirmed annual net taxable income. The solidarity contribution, minimum tax and deduction derivation remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary IRPP on caller-confirmed annual net taxable income.
